name: git-time-machine
description: Hover over any line to see why it was written — powered by your Git history and AI.

commands.title: Git Time Machine: Ingest Current Repo

gitTimeMachine.backendUrl.description: URL of the Git Time Machine backend API.

gitTimeMachine.githubToken.description: Your GitHub personal access token (needs repo read scope).

gitTimeMachine.maxCommits.description: How many commits to ingest when indexing a repo. Higher values give more coverage but take longer.

enumDescriptions: Best quality explanations — latest Gemini 3 model (recommended).
Faster and cheaper — Gemini 2.0, slightly less precise.
Lightest and cheapest — lowest quota usage.
gitTimeMachine.geminiModel.description: Gemini model used for hover explanations.
